channel.title: HB 2340 - Applying substance use disorder monitoring program provisions to nursing assistants.

item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: First reading, referred to Health Care & Wellness.

item.title: 👍Anthony Partridge - Washington State Board of Nursing
item.description: Anthony Partridge signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington State Board of Nursing.

item.title: HCW - Executive action taken by committee.
item.description: HCW - Executive action taken by committee.

item.title: HCW - Majority; do pass.
item.description: HCW - Majority; do pass.

item.title: Referred to Rules 2 Review.

item.title: House passes Simmons’ bill supporting nursing assistants’ recovery efforts – Washington State House Democrats
item.description: News article "House passes Simmons’ bill supporting nursing assistants’ recovery efforts – Washington State House Democrats" from House Democrats.

item.title: Speaker signed.

item.title: Simmons bill supporting nursing assistants’ recovery efforts heads to Governor’s desk – Washington State House Democrats

item.title: Delivered to Governor.

item.title: President signed.
